content_body:
I went for a run! It was fun going up and down the various elevations.

This was a special trip because we had 3 generations under one roof. We had a lot of snuggles, giggles, and tickles.

Abby loved talking to Mr. Tree, Rachel liked walking on Main Street, collecting newspapers, and introducing her Zaidy to everyone.

Thanks for the beautiful place to stay and make lasting memories!

Loved every moment of it!
title: "Beautiful place to stay and make lasting memories!"
